case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-OFFICE OF CITY VS. ILYA FELDMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-OFFICE OF CITY ATTORNEY
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CONNIE YOUNG KIM BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-16-2015 AT 1:30 PM.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-OFFICE OF CITY ATTORNEY AS TO DEFENDANT FELDMAN, ILYA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-OFFICE OF CITY ATTORNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FELDMAN, ILYA $273.45 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $273.45, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, CONNIE YOUNG KIM, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FELDMAN, ILYA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $273.45 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-OFFICE OF CITY ATTORNEY AS TO DEFENDANT FELDMAN, ILYA KIM, CONNIE YOUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT ILYA FEIDMAN WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO COSTS, PLAINTIFF IS EXEMPT FROM COURT FEES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-OFFICE OF CITY ATTORNEY AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, CONNIE YOUNG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-29-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, CONNIE YOUNG
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO SENDER.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.
